required_validation_commands: pnpm.cmd --filter @matchpulse/api exec tsx --test src/final-prediction-domain.test.ts src/prediction-engine-v1.test.ts src/competition-model-profile.test.ts
expected_results: all specialist outputs retain their declared global weights for every target
missing specialist target outputs contribute fallback mass without target-local renormalization
effective market influence stays within the assigned approved cap
only the explicit market specialist contributes market probability distributions to model-output targets
finished probabilities remain terminal while stale or incomplete evidence degrades confidence and risk
caller limitation text is not copied verbatim into the public-shaped explanation
no route, service, worker, frontend, persistence, queue, or public contract change
